Hello Team,
Delete job completed successfully but number of rows deleted is zero. Please check the last record date below and ensure that this is within the threshold.
Last record in DB is of Date - %DOCTIMESTAMP%.

StoredProcedure End Time: %End Time%.
Thanks, OneHub webMethods
